entries.definition:
ṣ–l–ṣ–l noisy ass; the sound of a bell; dry clay on the
ground that makes a ringing sound when it is struck. Of this root,
one form, صَلْصَال ṣalṣāl, occurs four times in the Qur’an.

صَلْصَال ṣalṣāl [n.] dry clay (15:26) وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ مِن صَلْصَالٍ مِنْ
حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ We created humankind out of dry clay formed from
moulded mud.
entries.definition_english:
ṣ–l–ṣ–l noisy ass; the sound of a bell; dry clay on the
ground that makes a ringing sound when it is struck. Of this root,
one form, صَلْصَال ṣalṣāl, occurs four times in the Qur’an.

صَلْصَال ṣalṣāl [n.] dry clay (15:26) وَلَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا الْإِنسَانَ مِن صَلْصَالٍ مِنْ
حَمَإٍ مَّسْنُونٍ We created humankind out of dry clay formed from
moulded mud.
